title: Place of the Dead
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Place of the Dead''' was a location on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] captured and [[Terraforming/Legends|terraformed]] the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] into [[Coruscant/Legends#Yuuzhan'tar|Yuuzhan'tar]]. It was located near the [[Temple of the Modeler]].<ref name="TUF">''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Unifying Force]]''
